infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: TMS koristi lokaciju tokom aktivne ture kako bi dispecer video poziciju vozila.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TMS koristi lokaciju tokom aktivne ture za pracenje transporta.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow TMS to track your location during active tours.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow TMS to track your location in the background during active tours.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow TMS to access your location for tour tracking.
